status: NOT DEPLOYED — mainnet-ready, real-RWA micro-instance. Deploy wires the vault to mUSD (rebasing wrapper of Ondo USDY, so on-chain NAV accrues real yield). Run `DEPOSIT_AMOUNT=<mUSD wei> PRIVATE_KEY=<funded key> forge script script/DeployMainnet.s.sol:DeployMainnet --rpc-url mantle --broadcast` (omit DEPOSIT_AMOUNT to deploy wiring only). Needs a funded Mantle key: real MNT for gas + mUSD to deposit. Contracts are UNAUDITED (SECURITY.md) — keep deposits at demo scale.

assets.comment: Verified live Mantle mainnet assets the system wires to.

dex.comment: FusionX V2 (Uniswap-V2-style) on Mantle mainnet. Router/factory RPC-verified on-chain 2026-06-04 (factory() matches; live USDC/WMNT pool quotes ~0.585 USDC/MNT). FusionXAdapter is fork-tested against this router + pool (test/FusionXAdapter.fork.t.sol).
dex.name: FusionX V2
